unified-memory-architecture.name: Unified Memory Architecture
unified-memory-architecture.description: How shared CPU, GPU, and accelerator memory changes inference bottlenecks, especially on Apple Silicon systems.

quantization.name: Quantization
quantization.description: The practical tradeoffs of 4-bit, 8-bit, and mixed-precision model formats in local inference.

llama-cpp.name: llama.cpp
llama-cpp.description: Coverage of llama.cpp behavior, configuration, and performance as a production-class local inference runtime.

mlx.name: MLX
mlx.description: Apple's MLX stack and its behavior on local inference workloads where framework choice materially changes results.

transformer-architecture.name: Transformer Architecture
transformer-architecture.description: Model-architecture concepts that explain observed latency, memory pressure, and throughput behavior.

memory-bandwidth.name: Memory Bandwidth
memory-bandwidth.description: Bandwidth ceilings, working-set size, and the points where inference stops being explained by simple bytes-per-token math.

benchmark-methodology.name: Benchmark Methodology
benchmark-methodology.description: Measurement design, run structure, reproducibility, and the assumptions behind Silicon Logic benchmark claims.

signed-runs.name: Signed Runs
signed-runs.description: Cryptographically signed BenchmarkRun artifacts and the verification path from article claim to raw measurement record.

first-token-latency.name: First-Token Latency
first-token-latency.description: The latency readers feel before generation begins, including prompt ingestion, scheduling, and first decode behavior.
